{{CargoOrgan
|name=Venom Blossom
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10684
|idx=42
|description=From afar, a radiant and bewitching bloom — but its razor-sharp, venom-tipped petals wait only to strike down those who let their guard down.
|skill=When the enemy's HP is below 306% of your ATK, 21% chance to summon the Abyssal Maw to devour the enemy!
|hp=2900
|def=209
|atk=169
|rush=177
|gene1=In Gastric Pouch combat, all ELMT DMG +60
|gene2=In Gastric Pouch combat, ignore enemy DEF +3%
|gene3=In Gastric Pouch combat, Dodge rate +9%
|gene4=In Gastric Pouch combat, weakness check -6%
|gene5=In Gastric Pouch combat, DMG to enemy +9%
|gene7=In Gastric Pouch combat, DMG to enemy +9% (Awakened)
|}}
